actionItems.title: Favorite
actionItems.description: PFJ uses Red Hat star icon (viewBox 0 0 32 32), PF uses FontAwesome star (viewBox 0 0 576 512); switch to FontAwesome star for consistency

actionItems.title: Favorite
actionItems.description: PFJ capitalizes aria-label ("Not starred"/"Starred"), PF uses lowercase ("not starred"/"starred"); align casing with PF

actionItems.title: Hamburger
actionItems.description: PFJ is missing aria-expanded attribute; add aria-expanded="false" (toggled to "true" when open)

actionItems.title: Hamburger
actionItems.description: PFJ uses aria-label="Menu", PF uses aria-label="Hamburger"; align with PF

actionItems.title: Plain with no padding
actionItems.description: PFJ uses close icon (viewBox 0 0 20 20), PF uses question-circle icon (viewBox 0 0 32 32); use the correct icon in the showcase demo

actionItems.title: Circle buttons
actionItems.description: Add missing tertiary and warning circle button variants

actionItems.title: Circle buttons
actionItems.description: Add missing plain and control circle button variants

actionItems.title: Aria-disabled
actionItems.description: Add missing danger-secondary and danger-link aria-disabled combinations

actionItems.title: Progress
actionItems.description: Add non-in-progress states (primary with progress but not loading, secondary with progress but not loading)

actionItems.title: Progress
actionItems.description: Add plain in-progress spinner and inline link progress variants

actionItems.title: Hamburger
actionItems.description: Add expand and collapse animated state variants
